title: Shortest Path to Get All Keys
titleCn: 获取所有钥匙的最短路径

testcases.input: grid = ["@.a..","###.#","b.A.B"] Output: 8 Explanation: Note that the goal is to obtain all the keys not to open all the locks.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: Note that the goal is to obtain all the keys not to open all the locks.
